content:
# Recommendations — after iter-005 (P1b-i complete)

## Headline
Foundations are now REAL. 5 opaque stubs → axiom-clean defs (`IsLFP`, `IsFreeMod`,
`IsSFlat`, `tensorMod`, `IsInvertibleMod`). The cheap "opaque ⇒ unprovable" shield
is gone for 3 of the 6 sorries. **Advance strategy to P1b-ii (real proving).**

## Prioritize next (now genuinely provable — were opaque-blocked)
1. **`exists_free_resolution_step` (1.4)** — RECOMMENDED FIRST. Concludes
   `IsFreeMod`/`IsLFP` (now real). Build a `ShortComplex X.Modules` witness
   `0→K→J→I→0`, `J` free (`SheafOfModules.free (R := X.ringCatSheaf) Λ`, witness
   `⟨Λ,⟨iso⟩⟩`). Inputs available: `External.descent_noetherian` (axiom) + finite
   free presentation theory. Affine base, both `IsAffine`.
2. **`H_tensor` (1.1.3)** — iso `tensorMod (H..) N ≅ H (tensorBC f I N) F`; real
   `tensorMod`/`H`. Needs right-exactness-in-second-variable proof.
3. **`H_tensor_invertible` (1.1.2)** — iso `H(I⊗L,F⊗L) ≅ H(I,F)`; real
   `tensorMod`/`IsInvertibleMod`. Needs invariance-under-twist proof.
   (2,3 are harder than 1 — real categorical work; tackle after 1 lands.)

## Do NOT re-assign (still opaque-conclusion — needs a real def FIRST)
- `H_locallyFree_of_ext_vanishing` (1.3) — concl. `IsLocallyFreeOfFiniteRankOn` (opaque).
- `ext_finite_flat` 2nd conjunct (1.10) — concl. `IsLFPAndFlatOn` (opaque); 1st
  conjunct already closed (`External.ext_vanishing_open`).
- `exists_acyclic_surjection` (1.2) — concl. uses `extGroup` (opaque).
These need P1b-iii: give the remaining opaque stubs real defs. Next-best def-build
target is **`IsLocallyFreeOfFiniteRankOn`** (gates 1.3, whose other input
`H_represents` is already proven) — same playbook as this iter
(`SheafOfModules.free`/finite-rank locally).

## Coverage debt (planner: add blueprint entries)
`archon dag-query unmatched` = 2 `lean_aux` nodes, no blueprint entry:
- `MR0555258CompactifyingPicard.instNonemptyModules` — `instance : Nonempty X.Modules
  := ⟨0⟩` (zero object). Still REQUIRED by opaque `relExt` (returns `S.Modules`).
- `MR0555258CompactifyingPicard.instNonemptyModulesFunctor` — `Nonempty` of the
  functor cat. Still REQUIRED by opaque `tensorBaseChangeFunctor` (returns
  `S.Modules ⥤ X.Modules`).
Both become removable only once those two opaque decls get real defs (P1b-iii); until
then add two trivial blueprint definition stubs to restore 1-to-1 (NOTE: iter-004
confirmed `private` does NOT drop them from the scan).

## Reusable patterns (added to Knowledge Base)
- `X.Modules = SheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf` definitionally; `X.ringCatSheaf.obj
  = X.presheaf ⋙ forget₂ CommRingCat RingCat` by `rfl`. Lets `CommRingCat`-indexed
  Mathlib lemmas fire on `M.val` with `R := X.presheaf`.
- Stalk-module instance must be applied EXPLICITLY `(R := X.presheaf) (M := M.val)`
  via `letI` — does not auto-synthesize.
- Tensor of sheaves of modules = sheafify of presheaf tensor (avoids absent
  `MonoidalCategory X.Modules`).

## Housekeeping
- User: mark the 6 `External.*` axioms protected in `archon-protected.yaml` to
  silence the recurring doctor flag (re-flagged every iter; not a defect).
